title: Quick check: tracing a failed search

questions.text: Using the tree (root 5, left child 3 with children 1 and 4, right child 8 with children 7 and 9), how many comparisons does searching for the value 6 make before the algorithm concludes it is not in the tree?
questions.explanation: 6 vs 5: 6 is bigger, go right (1). 6 vs 8: 6 is smaller, go left (2). 6 vs 7: 6 is smaller, go left (3), but 7 has no left child, so the search falls off the tree after 3 comparisons and reports 'not found'.
